description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a robust, angular body with heavy armor plating covering all sides. The exterior is finished in a dark, solid color, with visible reinforced sections and ribbed surfaces for added protection. The vehicle has a low, wide profile, with a prominent circular hatch or turret on the top and several access panels and ports along the sides. There are no visible wheels or tracks, suggesting a possible hover or modular base. Markings include warning triangles and hazard stripes near mechanical components, as well as a few circular ports and grilles for ventilation or sensors. The overall design emphasizes durability and defense, with minimal external ornamentation and a focus on functional, utilitarian features.
description: A heavily armored, angular combat tactical vehicle with a dark finish, reinforced panels, and a prominent top hatch. Markings and hazard stripes accentuate its utilitarian, defensive design.
description_view_0: Front view shows a broad, flat armored face with a central raised section and minimal openings, emphasizing protection.
description_view_1: Side view reveals hazard-striped mechanical components, warning triangles, and multiple ports and grilles, highlighting functional details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays ribbed armor plating and a solid, blocky structure with no visible access points or weapon mounts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, with additional ports and hazard markings, reinforcing the vehicle's tactical utility.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One circular mount or hatch on the roof, no visible external weapon mounts or hardpoints.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating; ribbed and reinforced sections visible on sides and rear.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark green color, no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: Red warning triangles and yellow-black hazard stripes on side mechanical components.
